name: @jmieloch/aesir-test
description: Design token package (CSS variables + Tailwind theme tokens)

scripts.verify:package-name: node -e "const n=require('./package.json').name;if(!n.startsWith('@')||n==='@your-org/your-design-tokens'){console.error('Set final scoped package name in package.json before publishing.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.tokens: style-dictionary build --config style-dictionary.config.js && style-dictionary build --config style-dictionary.dark.config.js && node scripts/build-token-presets.mjs
scripts.publish:check: npm run verify:package-name && npm run build
